name: BULTUNGIN

abilities.name: Combat Finesse
abilities.text: When this model is targeted with a (m) action, the attacking model's duel cannot be cheated.

abilities.name: Deadly Pursuit
abilities.text: During the end phase, this model may move up to 4".

abilities.name: Smell the Kill
abilities.text: After this model resolves the Interact action, a friendly beast may move up to 3" toward this model.

actions.name: Rootfang
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is in base contact with severe terrain, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Coordinated Attack
triggers.text: Another friendly model may declare a (melee) action targeting the same model.

triggers.name: Pick the Bones
triggers.text: After killing, this model may declare the Interact action after resolving the current action.

actions.name: Baying Howl
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target must pass a TN 11 Wp duel or gain an Adversary token. Then, move another friendly beast within range up to 3".

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

extraction_notes: Model limit is 3 based on 'Minion (3)' characteristic
